name: Synergy Health plc
description: Synergy Health plc was a global healthcare services company headquartered in the United Kingdom, specializing in sterilization and decontamination services for hospitals and medical device manufacturers. The company provided a wide range of outsourced services, including laundry, linen management, and sterile processing, to support healthcare providers in maintaining high standards of hygiene and patient safety. In October 2015, Synergy Health was acquired by STERIS Corporation for approximately $1.9 billion. Following the acquisition, the combined entity continued operations under the STERIS brand, integrating Synergy's expertise into its global portfolio of infection prevention and procedural healthcare solutions.
